CREATE TABLE mysch.imp_article (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));
CREATE TABLE mysch.imp_order (id INT PRIMARY KEY, article_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (article_id) REFERENCES mysch.imp_article(id));
TRUNCATE TABLE mysch.imp_article RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE mysch.test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description TEXT);
CREATE TABLE mysch.main_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES mysch.test_table(id));
